item.title: [信号 8.0] Hackers Simply Asked Meta AI to Give Them Access to High-Profile Instagram Accounts. It Worked
item.description:
AI Score: 9.0

Signal Score: 8.0

Meta’s AI support bot reportedly allowed attackers to take over high-profile Instagram accounts by simply requesting account recovery actions like linking a new email address.

Tags: #security, #account-takeover, #AI-agents, #social-engineering, #platform-risk

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] 💻 GitHub Copilot 2026 年 6 月起改为按使用量计费，老用户调用 GPT-5.5 乘数达 57 倍
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 8.0

GitHub 宣布自 2026-06-01 起 Copilot 主要改为按 token 用量计费并提供月度 AI Credits，老年度计划用户可沿用旧计费至到期且 GPT-5.5 请求乘数为 57×。

Tags: #GitHub Copilot, #LLM计费, #Token用量, #开发者工具, #成本与定价

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] 三星内存芯片价格暴涨最高 60%，AI 数据中心建设潮加剧芯片短缺 据路透社独家报道，全球最大内存芯片制造商三星电子本月将特定内存芯片价格较 9 月份上调最高
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 8.0

路透称三星将部分DDR5内存合约价较9月上调最高60%，主因AI数据中心建设潮导致内存芯片短缺并引发客户抢购。

Tags: #Memory, #Semiconductors, #AI Data Centers, #DDR5, #Supply Chain

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] 马来西亚将对 📱 TikTok、📱 Instagram 等社交平台实施强制许可管理 马来西亚通信与多媒体委员会宣布，从 2026 年 1 月 1 日起，Tik
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 8.0

马来西亚宣布自 2026-01-01 起对用户数超 800 万的社交平台实施《1998 年通信与多媒体法》许可框架并强化用户安全责任。

Tags: #regulation, #social-media-platforms, #content-moderation, #Malaysia, #compliance

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] Nvidia RTX Spark
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

Nvidia introduces RTX Spark, an Arm-based Windows PC processor platform aimed at laptops/desktops, prompting discussion about Windows-on-Arm compatibility and competitive positioning versus Apple, Intel, and AMD.

Tags: #NVIDIA, #Windows on Arm, #PC hardware, #AI PCs, #GPU/CPU SoCs

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC, indicating preparations for a potential U.S. IPO.

Tags: #AI industry, #IPO, #SEC filings, #Anthropic, #public markets

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 英伟达发布 Vera Rubin 平台，黄仁勋预计 Blackwell 与 Rubin 截至 2027 年销售额 1 万亿美元 英伟达在 GTC 发布 Ver
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

英伟达在 GTC 发布 Vera Rubin 平台与 Vera CPU/Rubin GPU，并宣称多款芯片量产、性能效率提升及下半年伙伴供货，同时黄仁勋预测 Blackwell 与 Rubin 到 2027 年销售额可达 1 万亿美元。

Tags: #NVIDIA, #AI基础设施, #GPU/CPU硬件, #数据中心, #GTC发布

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] NVIDIA DLSS 4.5 光线重建 8 月覆盖全系 RTX 显卡
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

NVIDIA 宣布 8 月通过 NVIDIA App 推出 DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction，面向所有 RTX 显卡提升光追/路径追踪画质稳定性并首发支持 27 款游戏，Blender Cycles 亦计划在 Blender 5.3 集成。

Tags: #NVIDIA, #DLSS, #Ray Tracing, #Transformer Models, #Graphics Rendering

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 加州众议院通过法案，要求游戏停服后仍需可玩
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

加州众议院通过 AB 1921，要求依赖服务器的游戏在停服前提前通知并提供离线/社区服务器等继续游玩方案，否则需全额退款，拟于 2027 年起施行并正送参议院审议。

Tags: #gaming, #regulation, #consumer-rights, #live-service, #policy

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] AI 需求推动软银超越丰田，成为日本市值最大公司
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

在AI需求与大规模算力投资预期推动下，软银股价大涨并超越丰田成为日本市值最大公司。

Tags: #AI市场, #资本市场, #SoftBank, #算力基础设施, #OpenAI

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Malicious npm packages detected across Red Hat Cloud Services
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

An issue report and discussion highlight malicious npm packages detected in Red Hat Cloud Services and debate practical mitigations for recurring npm supply-chain compromises.

Tags: #supply-chain-security, #npm, #javascript, #devsecops, #open-source-security

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI risks
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Florida’s attorney general filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging AI-related harms, sparking debate about liability, evidence, and political incentives.

Tags: #AI regulation, #AI safety, #legal liability, #LLMs, #policy

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 闲鱼 AI 误将用户手机照片自动上架，陕历博文物被标价 6000 元
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

闲鱼因AI识别与自动发布机制误将用户手机照片生成商品并上架出售，平台下架致歉并宣布加强确认流程及对文物等高敏类目提高发布门槛。

Tags: #AI安全与治理, #隐私与数据权限, #电商平台, #内容审核/合规, #自动化发布

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 4.0

CS336 is a Stanford course that teaches end-to-end language modeling from scratch with challenging, hands-on assignments and guidance on training compute.

Tags: #LLMs, #deep-learning-education, #transformers, #NLP, #training-compute

Read original

item.title: [信号 3.0] Should you normalize RGB values by 255 or 256?
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 3.0

Explains the numerical and practical consequences of normalizing 8-bit RGB values using 255 vs 256 (and related rounding strategies) when converting between integer color channels and floating-point representations.

Tags: #computer-graphics, #numerical-methods, #color-science, #image-processing, #floating-point

Read original

item.title: [信号 3.0] What appear to be biochemical processes may be a natural feature of geology
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 3.0

The article argues that chemical signatures often interpreted as biochemical may instead be naturally produced by geological processes, reframing some evidence relevant to life’s origins and astrobiology searches.

Tags: #astrobiology, #origin-of-life, #geochemistry, #prebiotic-chemistry, #science

Read original
